nasb.text: Now I want you to know, brethren, that my circumstances have turned out for the greater progress of the gospel,

esv.text: I want you to know, brothers, that what has happened to me has really served to advance the gospel,

cnv.text: 弟兄們，我願意你們知道，我所遭遇的反而使福音更加興旺了，

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，我希望你们知道，我的遭遇反而会使福音传得更广，

csbs.text: 弟兄们，我愿你们知道，我的遭遇反而促进了福音的进展，
